name: ng-form
title: Form (Angular)
description: Form field scaffolding for Angular forms - FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormDescription, FormMessage. Wires field state, validation errors, and accessibility attributes. Mirrors React Form (react-hook-form integration) from @gremorie/rx-forms.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-form.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
